=== Current donation requests ===

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Page
! Last edited to application
! User 
! Global edits
! Edits in last 3 months
! Age of account
! Home Wiki
! Approved
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/511KeV]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/511KeV}}}}
| [[User:511KeV]]
| 289,021
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2020|12|13}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Vjsuseela]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Vjsuseela}}}}
| [[User:Vjsuseela]]
| 20,135
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2014|04|16}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Aafi]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Aafi}}}}
| [[User:Aafi]]
| 73,935
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2019|03|21}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Abubakar A Gwanki]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Abubakar A Gwanki}}}}
| [[User:Gwanki]]
| 70,443
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2013|11|16}}
| hawiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/ChiK]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/ChiK}}}}
| [[User:ChiK]]
| 46,296
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2017|05|08}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Jagmit Singh Brar]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Jagmit Singh Brar}}}}
| [[User:Jagmit Singh Brar]]
| 52,463
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2017|05|07}}
| pawiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/J ansari/3]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/J ansari/3}}}}
| [[User:J ansari]]
| 68,425
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2016|09|04}}
| hiwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/MYADAM ABHILASH]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/MYADAM ABHILASH}}}}
| [[User:MYADAM ABHILASH]]
| 8,865
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2021|01|22}}
| tewiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Suyash.dwivedi]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Suyash.dwivedi}}}}
| [[User:Suyash.dwivedi]]
| 239,876
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2013|09|06}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ран-кан]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ран-кан}}}}
| [[User:Ран-кан]]
| 231,603
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2012|02|04}}
| srwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nokib Sarkar]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Nokib Sarkar}}}}
| [[User:Nokib Sarkar]]
| 24,062
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2017|04|15}}
| enwiki
| 
|-

| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ndahiro derrick}}}}
| [[User:Ndahiro derrick]]
| 5,307
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2019|03|02}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Dezedien]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Dezedien}}}}
| [[User:Dezedien]]
| 64,300
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2012|05|10}}
| arwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang]]

| [[User:Ballardmaize]]
| 43,008
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2014|07|26}}
| incubatorwiki
| 
|-

| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/justwiki}}}}
| [[User:Justwiki]]
| 104,363
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2008|10|12}}
| arwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/ZI Jony]]

| [[User:ZI Jony]]
| 407,237
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2017|03|16}}
| enwiki
| 
|-

| [[User:DaSupremo]]
| 475,690
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2014|05|15}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Ogundele1]]
| 2,779
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2018|07|21}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Abike25]]
| 43,576

| {{age in years and months|2022|09|23}}
| metawiki

| [[User:Dolphyb]]

| {{age in years and months|2020|06|21}}
| enwiki

| [[User:Philemon Niyomwungeli]]

| metawiki

| metawiki

| [[User:Kalakpagh]]

| wikidatawiki

| [[User:Jwale2]]

| enwiki

| [[User:Orokbest1]]

| enwiki

| [[User:Annick green]]

| enwiki

| frwiki

| enwiki

| [[User:Ibjaja055]]

| enwiki

| [[User:EYo237]]

| frwiki

| [[User:Pharouqenr]]

| [[User:Nnamadee]]

| hawiki

| [[User:Senator Choko]]

| enwiki

| [[User:BnHamid]]

| enwiki

| enwiki

| tewiki

| enwikisource

| [[User:Muralikrishna m]]

| tewiki

| enwiki

| enwiki

| enwiki

| bawiki

| eswiki

| {{age in years and months|2025|03|27}}
| aswiki

| [[User:Albetudu]]

| satwiki

| frwiki

| [[User:Noooote]]

| [[User:Dev ammar]]

| [[User:Eunice Ameh]]

| enwiki

| [[User:Muhdavdullahi]]

| hawiki

| [[User:Ibrahim abusufyan]]

| hawiki

| [[User:Manamarthe]]

| frwiki
|

| [[User:Mr. Snatch]]

| {{age in years and months|2022|03|17}}
| enwiki
| 
|-

| [[User:Knowledge and philosophy]]
| 3,503
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2021|07|31}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/CalebTokula6]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/CalebTokula6}}}}
| [[User:CalebTokula6]]
| 954
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2024|03|02}}
| wikifunctionswiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Obedmakolo]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Obedmakolo}}}}
| [[User:Obedmakolo]]
| 8,208
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2022|05|19}}
| wikidatawiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Africany]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Africany}}}}
| [[User:Africany]]
| 17,497
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2023|07|03}}
| frwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Bamjos]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Bamjos}}}}
| [[User:Bamjos]]
| 18,779
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2024|01|08}}
| enwikivoyage
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Maryleine]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Maryleine}}}}
| [[User:Maryleine]]
| 3,328
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2023|11|28}}
| frwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ennydavids]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ennydavids}}}}
| [[User:Ennydavids]]
| 4,305
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2022|05|16}}
| igwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Charles Kalanzi]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Charles Kalanzi}}}}
| [[User:Charles Kalanzi]]
| 6,066
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2025|03|20}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Mahuta]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Mahuta}}}}
| [[User:Mahuta]]
| 40,329
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2020|06|26}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Premchand murmu thakur]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Premchand murmu thakur}}}}
| [[User:Nacharhopon]]
| 1,621
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2019|12|19}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/ParasharSarthak]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/ParasharSarthak}}}}
| [[User:ParasharSarthak]]
| 367
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2021|03|10}}
| metawiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Anasskoko]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Anasskoko}}}}
| [[User:Anasskoko]]
| 22,953
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2019|05|29}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Antonyahu]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Antonyahu}}}}
| [[User:Antonyahu]]
| 28,256
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2015|06|03}}
| ukwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Sir Amugi]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Sir Amugi}}}}
| [[User:Sir Amugi]]
| 61,619
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2021|01|29}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman}}}}
| [[User:Shahidul Hasan Roman]]
| 16,890
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2016|04|14}}
| bnwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Leeturtle]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Leeturtle}}}}
| [[User:Leeturtle]]
| 4,796
| unknown
| {{age in years and months|2010|10|07}}
| enwiki
| 
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun]] 
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun}}}}
| [[User:Hamed Gamaoun]]
| unknown
| unknown
| 
| 
| 
|}
